texto: I got the acting bug really young, when I was around, like, 10. I pretty much just wanted to be Michael J. Fox. He was in 'Teen Wolf' - that was, like, the coolest role, and then he did 'Back to the Future,' and that was the coolest role.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Bryan Greenberg: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a reflexao. O trecho “I got the acting bug really young, when I was around, like, 10. I pretty much just wanted to be M…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, future, wolf pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de wolf e acting.

frase_original: I got the acting bug really young, when I was around, like, 10. I pretty much just wanted to be Michael J. Fox. He was in 'Teen Wolf' - that was, like, the coolest role, and then he did 'Back to the Future,' and that was the coolest role.
